DP.553.0000:
MC: Good morning!
Is everyone raising Pokémon?\f
It’s time for the Battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0001:
MC: Good day!
Is everyone raising Pokémon?\f
It’s time for the Battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0002:
MC: Good evening!
Is everyone raising Pokémon?\f
It’s time for the Battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0003:
OK, let’s get with it and check in
on our Trainers!\f
DP.553.0004:
MC: All righty!
What’s next on Battling Trainers?\f
DP.553.0005:
MC: I hope you enjoyed this
showing of Battling Trainers.\f
Until the next broadcast...
Good-bye, and good battling!
DP.553.0006:
MC: On Battling Trainers, we’re
always on the hunt for news.\f
Our interviewers have scattered
throughout Sinnoh.\f
We look forward to hearing about
you, Trainers!\f
That’s all the time we have today!
Good-bye, and good battling!
DP.553.0007:
MC: Good morning.
It’s time for Trainer Research.\f
We examine the latest Pokémon trends
by going directly to the Trainers.\f
DP.553.0008:
MC: Good day.
It’s time for Trainer Research.\f
We examine the latest Pokémon trends
by going directly to the Trainers.\f
DP.553.0009:
MC: Good evening.
It’s time for Trainer Research.\f
We examine the latest Pokémon trends
by going directly to the Trainers.\f
DP.553.0010:
OK, let’s take a look at the first
piece of research we conducted.\f
DP.553.0011:
MC: Next up is this piece of
research.\f
DP.553.0012:
MC: We hope you enjoyed this edition
of Trainer Research.\f
Who knows, you may be the subject
of our research next time.\f
That’s it for this show today.
Farewell!
DP.553.0013:
MC: On Trainer Research, we always
seek Trainers willing to be interviewed\r
for the show.\f
If you spot an interviewer anywhere,
please stop by to say hello and grant\r
us an interview.\f
That’s all today. Farewell.
DP.553.0014:
MC: Pokémon! Battle! Watch!\f
Good morning!
Everyone keeping up the good battle?\f
It’s time for Pokémon Battle Watch,
where we do in-depth analyses of\r
hot-blooded battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0015:
MC: Pokémon! Battle! Watch!\f
Good day!
Everyone keeping up the good battle?\f
It’s time for Pokémon Battle Watch,
where we do in-depth analyses of\r
hot-blooded battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0016:
MC: Pokémon! Battle! Watch!\f
Good evening!
Everyone keeping up the good battle?\f
It’s time for Pokémon Battle Watch,
where we do in-depth analyses of\r
hot-blooded battling Trainers!\f
DP.553.0017:
Let’s get on with the show!
Battle! Watch!\f
DP.553.0018:
MC: Let’s move to the next segment!
Battle! Watch!\f
DP.553.0019:
MC: Oops, looks like we’re all out
of time!\f
Let’s meet again here!
Battle! Watch!
DP.553.0020:
MC: Pokémon Battle Watch needs
your help!\f
We’re always after news about your
hot Pokémon battles.\f
We’d also love it if you’d mix records
with friends in a Union Room.\f
That way, we can get battle news
about your friends, too.\f
Let’s meet again here!
Battle! Watch!
DP.553.0021:
MC: A Trainer’s Day!\f
This program offers unique looks into
the daily lives of Trainers.\f
We cover a variety of topics that
affect and concern Trainers.\f
DP.553.0022:
MC: A Trainer’s Day!\f
This program offers unique looks into
the daily lives of Trainers.\f
We cover a variety of topics that
affect and concern Trainers.\f
DP.553.0023:
MC: A Trainer’s Day!\f
This program offers unique looks into
the daily lives of Trainers.\f
We cover a variety of topics that
affect and concern Trainers.\f
DP.553.0024:
Let’s examine one aspect of
a Trainer’s day.\f
DP.553.0025:
MC: Let’s take a look at a Trainer’s
day from another perspective.\f
DP.553.0026:
MC: This brings us to the conclusion
of today’s A Trainer’s Day.\f
We hope you found it informative
and entertaining.\f
In even seemingly ordinary daily
routines, there is so much drama.\f
We’ll keep bringing you more looks
into the days of Trainers.\f
Good-bye, but just for now!
DP.553.0027:
MC: We seek tips on Trainer-related
news for coverage on the show.\f
Please also consider mixing records
with friends in a Union Room.\f
That will allow us to check the
routines of your friends, too.\f
Please tune in again next time.
Good-bye, but just for now!
DP.553.0028:
MC: Sinnoh News Net.\f
Good morning.
This is Sinnoh News Net.\f
DP.553.0029:
MC: Sinnoh News Net.\f
Hello.
This is Sinnoh News Net.\f
DP.553.0030:
MC: Sinnoh News Net.\f
Good evening.
This is Sinnoh News Net.\f
DP.553.0032: We now bring you this news story.\f
DP.553.0033:
MC: That’s all the news today.
Thank you for watching.
DP.553.0034:
MC: Sinnoh News Net has crews
gathering news all over Sinnoh.\f
Help our news-gathering efforts by
mixing records at any Union Room.\f
That will allow us to get news that
concerns your friends, too.\f
Please join us for the next showing
of the Sinnoh News Net.\f
Thank you for watching.
DP.553.0035:
MC: Good morning!\f
It’s now time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Like always, we look at a variety
of cool records set by Trainers.\f
DP.553.0036:
MC: Hello!\f
It’s now time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Like always, we look at a variety
of cool records set by Trainers.\f
DP.553.0037:
MC: Good evening!\f
It’s now time for Rack ’Em Up
Records!\f
Like always, we look at a variety
of cool records set by Trainers.\f
DP.553.0038:
All right, let’s have our experts
Serge and Tanya take over.\f
Here’s hoping they have some
interesting records to cover!\f
DP.553.0039:
MC: Let’s have our experts examine
another eyebrow-raising record!\f
DP.553.0040:
MC: We hope you enjoyed today’s
Rack ’Em Up Records as we did.\f
That’s all for today!
Bye-bye!
DP.553.0041:
MC: Rack ’Em Up Records wants to
hear from you!\f
Don’t be shy about telling us if you
set any new records.\f
Please also mix records with friends
at any Union Room.\f
That will let us examine the records
of your friends as well as yours.\f
We hope to catch the record-setting
moments of you, our loyal viewers!\f
That’s all for today!
Bye-bye!
DP.553.0042:
MC: Sinnoh! Now!\f
This is it!
The one you’ve all been waiting for!\f
It’s time for Sinnoh Now, your portal
to what’s hip and happening in Sinnoh!\f
DP.553.0043:
MC: Sinnoh! Now!\f
This is it!
The one you’ve all been waiting for!\f
It’s time for Sinnoh Now, your portal
to what’s hip and happening in Sinnoh!\f
DP.553.0044:
MC: Sinnoh! Now!\f
This is it!
The one you’ve all been waiting for!\f
It’s time for Sinnoh Now, your portal
to what’s hip and happening in Sinnoh!\f
DP.553.0045:
Here’s the first story on the cutting
edge of Sinnoh trends!\f
DP.553.0046:
MC: Here’s another story on the
cutting edge!\f
DP.553.0047:
MC: Did you enjoy this edition of
Sinnoh Now?\f
You can always count on us to keep
bringing you the information you want!\f
See you again!
DP.553.0048:
MC: Sinnoh Now goes the extra
distance to bring you news.\f
We promise to do our best to keep
you informed with the news you want!\f
See you again!
DP.553.0049:
MC: Good morning!\f
Tune in to this show and you’ll always
be on the cutting edge of fashion!\f
You guessed it!
It’s the Trend Tracker Show!\f
DP.553.0050:
MC: Hello!\f
Tune in to this show and you’ll always
be on the cutting edge of fashion!\f
You guessed it!
It’s the Trend Tracker Show!\f
DP.553.0051:
MC: Good evening!\f
Tune in to this show and you’ll always
be on the cutting edge of fashion!\f
You guessed it!
It’s the Trend Tracker Show!\f
DP.553.0052:
Let’s go to our latest trendy news
story. Take it away!\f
DP.553.0053:
Don’t go away, we have another
trendy news story next!\f
DP.553.0054:
MC: We do hope you found the Trend
Tracker Show informative.\f
Please tune in on our next
broadcast!\f
Over and out!
DP.553.0055:
MC: We do hope you found the Trend
Tracker Show informative.\f
We’ll be sure to keep you informed
about what’s in and not out!\f
Please tune in on our next
broadcast!\f
Over and out!
